data.name: IamError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during IAM operation.

data.name: IamError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in IAM.

data.name: IamError.ExternalServiceError
data.value: An external service error occurred in IAM.

data.name: ProfilesError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during profile operation.

data.name: ProfilesError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Profiles.

data.name: PublishingError.DuplicateTutorialTitle
data.value: A tutorial with title {0} already exists.

data.name: PublishingError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during publishing operation.

data.name: PublishingError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Publishing.

data.name: DevicesError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the Devices operation.

data.name: DevicesError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Devices.

data.name: AutomationError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the Automation operation.

data.name: AutomationError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Automation.

data.name: MonitoringError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the Monitoring operation.

data.name: MonitoringError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Monitoring.

data.name: EnergyAnalyticsError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the Energy Analytics operation.

data.name: EnergyAnalyticsError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Energy Analytics.

data.name: SubscriptionsError.ProfileAlreadySubscribed
data.value: The profile already has an active subscription.

data.name: SubscriptionsError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the Subscriptions operation.

data.name: SubscriptionsError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Subscriptions.
